top_signals.title: Trump demands ‘loyalty’ from Nato allies and slams lack of support in Iran war
top_signals.summary: US president singles out alliance members, including the UK, after meeting secretary-general Mark Rutte
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jinko Solar Eyes Breakeven This Year as China Moves to Ease Glut
top_signals.summary: Jinko Solar Co., one of the top five solar manufacturers in China, is looking to recoup expenses this year, as government measures alleviate the chronic overcapacity that has plunged the sector into more than two years of deep losses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin falls under $60K, but traders anticipate 15% bounce
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin price dropped below $60,000 for the first time in weeks, but data shows traders betting on a relief bounce.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
